title: Some of Your Projects! Featured Fangerines from #amytangerine
excerpt: Here are some light and fresh projects you posted to #amytangerine on Instagram! I love seeing how each person has such a unique take. 1 // How pretty are these Project Life cards that @_elizabeth_louise_ added my stamps to ?…
body:
Here are some light and fresh projects you posted to #amytangerine on Instagram! I love seeing how each person has such a unique take.

1 // How pretty are these Project Life cards that @_elizabeth_louise_ added my stamps to? 

2 // Love this colorful spread by @evy_passion!  

3 // @happynichi365’s rainbow Hobonichi spread. 

4 // A super cute baby bathtime layout by @junglebarrya!

I also wanted to feature Ashley Laura's lovely video of her decorating some die cut tags using my products. This might give you some ideas for ways to layer different supplies to create something totally new!

If these examples got your creative wheels turning, you can buy my latest collection, On a Whim, at Scrapbook.com and Simon Says Stamp. And if you use anything I’ve designed, definitely tag it with #amytangerine so I can see what you made!

Some of the links in this post are affiliate links. I receive a small percentage of sales at no cost to you! Every little bit helps me to bring you consistent content.
